case_title: BARRIOS, CARLOS, AS TRUSTEE OF THE CARLOS BARRIOS vs. TEJEDA, PAULA et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TEJEDA, PAULA MAXWELL, DENNIS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRIOS, CARLOS, AS TRUSTEE OF THE CARLOS BARRIOS FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEJEDA, PAULA MAXWELL, DENNIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/18/95 $1,795.74 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,375.74, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF ATTY MICHAEL J. RAIFSNIDER, IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED 12/7/95 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRIOS, CARLOS, AS TRUSTEE OF THE CARLOS BARRIOS FAMILY TRUST

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT TEJEDA, PAULA MAXWELL, DENNIS HEARING SET FOR MAY-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
